logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'doppler_fft_256_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_49_1' (loop 'VITIS_LOOP_49_1'): Unable to schedule 'load' operation ('buf_M_real_V_load_1', doppler_fft_project/doppler_fft.cpp:51) on array 'buf_M_real_V' due to limited memory ports (II = 1). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'buf_M_real_V'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-885 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-885.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-880] The II Violation in module 'fft_fast_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_23_4' (loop 'VITIS_LOOP_23_4'): Unable to enforce a carried dependence constraint (II = 6, distance = 1, offset = 1) between 'store' operation ('x_M_imag_addr_write_ln38', doppler_fft_project/doppler_fft.cpp:38) of variable 'trunc_ln864_3' on array 'x_M_imag' and 'load' operation ('upper._M_imag', doppler_fft_project/doppler_fft.cpp:28) on array 'x_M_imag'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-880 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-880.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_18_2' (doppler_fft_project/doppler_fft.cpp:17:9) in function 'fft_fast' the outer loop is not a perfect loop. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_22_3' (doppler_fft_project/doppler_fft.cpp:23:39) in function 'fft_fast' the outer loop is not a perfect loop because either the parent loop or the sub loop has no computeable trip count. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html
WARNING: [SYNCHK 200-23] C:/Xilinx/Vitis_HLS/2022.1/common/technology/autopilot\ap_fixed_base.h:1148: variable-indexed range selection may cause suboptimal QoR.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'doppler_fft_256_fpext_32ns_64_2_no_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'doppler_fft_256_fmul_32ns_32ns_32_4_max_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues. create_ip: Time (s): cpu = 00:00:05 ; elapsed = 00:00:07 . Memory (MB): peak = 1622.766 ; gain = 0.000
